title: Groups and Subgroups
excerpt: I heard chatter of this and have been excited about it ever since but it’s the ability to have groups within groups for clearer organisation.

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml: I heard chatter of this and have been excited about it ever since but it’s the ability to have groups within groups for clearer organisation.

posts.author: TheLisa (Lisa Lacey)
posts.cookedHtml: This is very much needed, as there is no good workaround.
